headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 20, 2026**
article:
The Boston Red Sox secured a 6-8 victory over the Detroit Tigers, with Riley Greene leading the Tigers' offense with 2 hits and 2 RBIs. The Houston Astros dominated the Cleveland Guardians in a 9-2 victory, with Isaac Paredes leading the charge at the plate. Paredes hit two home runs, including a fly ball to left field, and drove in two runs. The Cincinnati Reds secured a 6-1 victory over the Tampa Bay Rays, with Rhett Lowder earning the win.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, impacting their team's availability. Edwin Díaz has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to right elbow loose bodies. Miles Mastrobuoni and Brendan Donovan have been placed on the 60-day and 10-day injured lists, respectively, due to right calf strain and left groin muscle strain. Jonathan India has been placed on the 10-day injured list retroactive to April 19, 2026, due to left shoulder subluxation. Michael Grove has been transferred from the 15-day to the 60-day injured list due to right shoulder surgery. Mason Englert has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to right forearm tightness.

The Houston Astros made a move on April 19, 2026, acquiring shortstop Braden Shewmake in a trade. Shewmake joins the Astros after being dealt from the New York Yankees. The Los Angeles Dodgers traded RHP Chayce McDermott to the Baltimore Orioles for RHP Axel Perez. The New York Mets traded LHP Richard Lovelady to the Washington Nationals for cash. The Arizona Diamondbacks traded RHP Junior Fernández to the Milwaukee Brewers. The Philadelphia Phillies traded RHP Griff McGarry to the Los Angeles Dodgers for Future Considerations and International Bonus Pool Money.

top_news.title: **Red Sox Rally Past Tigers 8-6**
top_news.summary: The Boston Red Sox secured a 6-8 victory over the Detroit Tigers, with Riley Greene leading the Tigers' offense with 2 hits and 2 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Astros Blast Guardians 9-2**
top_news.summary: The Houston Astros dominated the Cleveland Guardians in a 9-2 victory, with Isaac Paredes leading the charge at the plate. Paredes hit two home runs, including a fly ball to left field, and drove in two runs.

top_news.title: **Reds Take Down Rays 6-1**
top_news.summary: The Cincinnati Reds secured a 6-1 victory over the Tampa Bay Rays, with Rhett Lowder earning the win. Sal Stewart led the Reds' offense with 2 hits, including a home run, and 2 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Cardinals Fall to Marlins in 3-5 Showdown**
top_news.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals suffered a 3-5 loss to the Miami Marlins, with Agustín Ramírez leading the Cardinals' offense with a home run and 1 RBI. Max Meyer pitched 5.1 innings for the Marlins, striking out 8 batters and allowing 2 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Díaz Lands on IL with Elbow Issue**
top_news.summary: Los Angeles Dodgers right-hander Edwin Díaz has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to right elbow loose bodies.

top_news.title: **Astros Acquire Shewmake in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Houston Astros made a move on April 19, 2026, acquiring shortstop Braden Shewmake in a trade. Shewmake joins the Astros after being dealt from the New York Yankees.
